summary: Hotel Payment/Invoice Module Testing Complete. Backend: 11/11 API tests passed. Frontend: All Super Admin invoice features and Hotel Portal Facturation page working. VTC 7/8 Places SEO pages loading correctly.

issues: React hydration warnings in console due to Emergent preview system wrapper elements injecting <span> into <select>, <tbody> - cosmetic only, does NOT affect functionality

backend_tests.admin_invoice_summary: PASS - GET /api/admin/hotels/invoices/summary returns total_invoices, pending_count, paid_count, pending_amount, paid_amount
backend_tests.admin_invoice_list: PASS - GET /api/admin/hotels/invoices returns array of invoices with all required fields
backend_tests.admin_invoice_auth: PASS - Invoice endpoints return 401 without token
backend_tests.admin_mark_paid_invalid: PASS - PUT /api/admin/hotels/invoices/{id}/pay returns 404 for non-existent invoice
backend_tests.admin_generate_duplicate: PASS - POST /api/admin/hotels/invoices/generate returns 400 for duplicate period
backend_tests.hotel_invoices_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/hotel/invoices returns invoices for logged-in hotel only
backend_tests.hotel_invoices_auth: PASS - Hotel invoice endpoint returns 401 without token
backend_tests.hotel_invoice_download: PASS - GET /api/hotel/invoices/{id}/download returns text/plain invoice file with FACTURE content
backend_tests.hotel_invoice_isolation: PASS - Download endpoint returns 404 for other hotel's invoices
backend_tests.invoice_pending_structure: PASS - Pending invoices have correct fields (due_date, commission_amount, paid_at=null)
backend_tests.invoice_paid_structure: PASS - Paid invoices have paid_at timestamp and payment_method

frontend_tests.super_admin_login: PASS - Login with admin@zont.cab/admin123 redirects to /admin

super_admin_payments_page.stat_cards: PASS - 4 cards: Total factures (3), En attente (151.18 EUR), Payee (99.09 EUR), Commissions totales (250.27 EUR)
super_admin_payments_page.generate_btn: PASS - 'Generer factures du mois' button present
super_admin_payments_page.status_filter: PASS - dropdown with Tous statuts, En attente, Payee options
super_admin_payments_page.hotel_filter: PASS - dropdown with all hotels (Bristol, Negresco, W Barcelona)
super_admin_payments_page.invoices_table: PASS - Shows 3 invoices with FACTURE, HOTEL, PERIODE, RES., CA, COMMISSION, ECHEANCE, STATUT, ACTION columns
super_admin_payments_page.pay_button: PASS - 'Payer' buttons visible for pending invoices (2 buttons)
super_admin_payments_page.payment_form: PASS - Opens with method select, reference input, and 'Confirmer' button

super_admin_filters.hotel_filter: PASS - Filtering to hotel shows only that hotel's invoices

frontend_tests.super_admin_sidebar: PASS - 'Paiements Hotels' link present in sidebar under HOTEL KIOSK section
frontend_tests.hotel_portal_login: PASS - Login with admin@bristol.fr/hotelc9baf685 redirects to /hotel

hotel_portal_invoices.sidebar_nav: PASS - 'Facturation' link present and navigates to /hotel/invoices
hotel_portal_invoices.stat_cards: PASS - 3 cards: Commission totale (99.09 EUR), Deja paye (99.09 EUR), En attente (0 EUR)
hotel_portal_invoices.invoice_card: PASS - Shows INV-202603-C9BAF6, Periode 2026-03, Status Payee
hotel_portal_invoices.invoice_details: PASS - Shows 4 reservations, CA: 660.59 EUR, Taux: 15%, Echeance: 2026-04-30
hotel_portal_invoices.payment_info: PASS - Shows 'Paye le 2026-03-17 par virement — Ref: VIR-2026-001'

vtc_8_places.hero_section: PASS - Shows 'Minibus with Private Driver | Zont.cab'
vtc_8_places.booking_form: PASS - Form with Pickup, Destination, Date, Time fields and 'BOOK NOW' button
vtc_8_places.popular_routes: PASS - Shows CDG, Orly, Disneyland routes with prices

vtc_7_places.hero_section: PASS - Shows 'Van with Private Driver | Zont.cab'
vtc_7_places.vehicle_info: PASS - Mercedes V-Class, VW Caravelle mentioned
vtc_7_places.how_to_book: PASS - 'How to Book Your 7-Seat VTC' section found

verified_features: Super Admin can view invoice summary stats
Super Admin can list all invoices with hotel and payment details
Super Admin can filter invoices by status (pending/paid)
Super Admin can filter invoices by hotel
Super Admin 'Payer' button opens payment form
Payment form has method select, reference input, and confirm button
Hotel Portal has 'Facturation' link in sidebar
Hotel can view their own invoices with commission details
Hotel can see payment info for paid invoices
Hotel can download invoice as text file
VTC 8 Places SEO page loads with booking form
VTC 7 Places SEO page loads with booking form
Both VTC pages support FR/EN/RU languages
critical_code_review_comments: Invoice routes correctly placed BEFORE /{hotel_id} catch-all route to avoid routing conflicts
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Commission calculations correct (hotel_commission + zont_commission + driver_amount = total_price)
Invoice isolation working - hotels can only see/download their own invoices
Payment status tracking includes paid_at timestamp, method, and reference

seed_data.invoices: 3 invoices exist for period 2026-03 (Bristol=paid, Negresco=pending, W Barcelona=pending)
seed_data.totals: Total factures: 3, En attente: 151.18 EUR, Payee: 99.09 EUR, Commissions totales: 250.27 EUR

context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice module fully tested. Super Admin: /admin/hotel-payments shows invoices with filters, summary cards, pay buttons. Hotel Portal: /hotel/invoices shows hotel-specific invoices with download. VTC pages: /vtc-7-places and /vtc-8-places are SEO landing pages using CityTransferPage component. React hydration warnings are from Emergent preview system wrapper elements, not actual bugs.

mocked_api.note: All APIs are real, hitting MongoDB with invoice data
